title: Glomera verruculosa
taxonomy: Glomera verruculosa belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the genus Glomera. It is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The species is classified as a terrestrial orchid and is known for its unique appearance. Glomera verruculosa is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is a large and diverse group within the Orchidaceae family. The classification of Glomera verruculosa provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
